name: Les Légions Noires
description: '''Les Légions Noires''' (also known as '''The Black Legions''' in English, or simply abbreviated to '''LLN''') is a movement of French underground [[black metal]] musicians and their bands, centered mostly around the city of [[Brest, France|Brest]], in [[Brittany (administrative region)|Brittany]]. The bands involved limited their releases to very small numbers (often just enough to get to the other circle members), and distributed them among friends and close workers. The collective was primarily active between 1993 and 1997.
